name: USB-C Hub
description: Multiport USB-C hub that expands a single USB-C port into multiple ports including USB 3.0, HDMI, VGA, Ethernet, and SD card slots. Perfect for connecting monitors, keyboards, and other accessories to your laptop

name: Gaming Keyboard
description: High-performance mechanical gaming keyboard with RGB lighting and programmable keys

name: Bluetooth Headphones
description: Wireless Bluetooth headset with noise cancellation and long battery life.
